- Repository name

Return ALL findings in a structured format. Be thorough — this data will be used for a resume and career analysis.
</USER_REQUEST>

To view the pinned repositories for the GitHub user **Joel01010**, you should navigate directly to their GitHub profile page at **[github.com/Joel01010](https://github.com/Joel01010)**.

On GitHub, users can pin up to six public repositories to their profile to showcase their most important or representative work[1][2][3]. If Joel01010 has configured this section, the pinned repositories will appear prominently on the main overview tab of their profile[4][5].

If you are unable to see a "Pinned" section on their profile, it may be because:
*   **No repositories have been pinned:** The user has not selected any repositories to feature[4].
*   **Privacy settings:** The user may have set their profile activity to private, which can sometimes affect the visibility of certain profile sections[6].
*   **Account status:** The repositories themselves might not be public, and pinned repositories must be public to be displayed[1][2].
